documents.title: Phishing Example 1
documents.content:
Classification: Phishing
Scenario: Payroll account issue
Example text: Urgent: your Payroll account issue requires immediate action. Sign in now using this link and confirm your password.
Red flags: urgency, credential request, unexpected link or attachment, pressure to bypass normal process.

documents.title: Phishing Example 2
documents.content:
Classification: Phishing
Scenario: Payroll account issue
Example text: Your Payroll account issue will be suspended today unless you verify your credentials immediately.
Red flags: urgency, credential request, unexpected link or attachment, pressure to bypass normal process.

documents.title: Phishing Example 3
documents.content:
Classification: Phishing
Scenario: Payroll account issue

Red flags: urgency, credential request, unexpected link or attachment, pressure to bypass normal process.

documents.title: Phishing Example 4
documents.content:
